header_subtitle: Upload as many PDFs as you want. Text and images will be analyzed together.
step1_hint: The system extracts text and images automatically. Each PDF is added to the database without removing the previous ones.
remove_title: Remove this PDF from the database
step2_hint: The AI will query text and images from all uploaded PDFs. The answer will be in the same language as your question.
query_placeholder: Type your question in any language...
topk_title: Number of excerpts considered by the AI
alert_clear_msg: Do you want to clear the ENTIRE database? All indexed data will be permanently removed.
alert_delete_msg: Do you want to remove "{filename}" and all its data from the database?
msg_conn_error: Connection error while uploading the file.
msg_conn_status: Connection error. Reload the page to check.
msg_no_pdf: Upload at least one PDF before searching.
msg_searching: Querying AI across all indexed PDFs...
msg_already_sent: This file has already been uploaded.
